feed.title: Tech Giants Rally on Strong AI Demand led by NVIDIA and Microsoft
feed.summary: Major technology companies including NVIDIA (NVDA) and Microsoft (MSFT) saw their shares surge as cloud computing service providers increased infrastructure spending on AI chips.

feed.title: Tesla Unveils Next-Gen Full Self-Driving Beta to Selected Market Testers
feed.summary: Tesla Inc. (TSLA) has rolled out its latest version of autonomous driving helper software, targeting safety and smooth execution in suburban areas.

feed.title: Apple Announces New Strategic AI Integration in Collaboration with OpenAI
feed.summary: Apple Inc. (AAPL) announces deep system integrations of generative AI across iOS, iPadOS and macOS ecosystems.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Rises on Google Cloud Expansion and Workspace Features
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) reported a record increase in Google Cloud subscriptions as small and enterprise firms deploy smart assistant tooling.
